xpCostType.description: Choose between cost types: -VANILLA_COST: the costs of the levels will be similar to the anvil -SPECIFIC_COST: determine a specific cost to disenchant items -NO_COST: there will be no cost to disenchant items

specificCostValue.description: Specifies the value of SPECIFIC_COST, the type must be selected for this value can work

damagePercentageWhenGrind.description: Specifies the value of the damage percent for the item when you use the grindstone

allowGrindCurses.description: Defines whether to allow transferring curses by using the grindstone

allowReduceRepairCost.description: Defines whether it is allowed to reduce the repair cost by using the grindstone

showExperienceCostTooltip.description: Defines whether the choose enchantment tooltip displays experience levels (this only works with VANILLA_COST type)

taxFreeLevelsCompatibility.description: Defines compatibility with the TaxFreeLevels mod (will work only if installed)
